summary: Completed comprehensive testing of language persistence and HTML lang attribute functionality. LanguageBootstrap implementation works correctly for programmatic language changes and navigation persistence, but the language switcher UI component on landing page has a bug.

ui_bugs.issue: Dropdown functionality not working - clicking language options doesn't trigger i18n.changeLanguage()

integration_issues.issue: Google OAuth redirect URI mismatch error - callback URL not properly registered in Google Cloud Console
affected_selectors: Google OAuth button on login page

passed_tests: LanguageBootstrap sets HTML lang='en' on initial load
LanguageBootstrap saves 'en' to localStorage on initialization
HTML lang attribute updates correctly when localStorage contains fr/es/en
Language persists across navigation from landing → login → register
Translations work correctly (French text shows on login page when lang='fr')
Google OAuth button exists and redirects to Google (with URI mismatch error)
success_percentage: frontend: 75% (7/8 core features working, UI switcher bug)
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix language switcher dropdown on landing page - the UI component is not calling i18n.changeLanguage() when options are clicked. Also fix Google OAuth redirect URI registration in Google Cloud Console to include the Pod URL.
